title: SuperSystem Role/Authority Matrix v1
description: Defines the authority boundaries, enforcement points, and evidence requirements for every system role.

Operator.description: Single front-door conversation agent. Receives user input, presents status, handles escalation UX.
can: Receive and normalize user input
Present status, results, and escalation prompts to user
Wrap fast-path tools (e.g., Transcribe) with status reporting
Forward intent to Orchestrator
cannot: Invoke Builder or Verify MCP directly
Modify system state beyond user-session scope
escalation_triggers: User explicitly requests escalation
Autonomy mode requires user approval at gate
Blocked status persists beyond retry cap
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: Operator may only call Orchestrator entry point and UX rendering tools
network_scope: no direct external API access except user-facing channels
runtime_guard: Operator outputs validated against normalized_request schema
evidence_required: Escalation event artifacts when escalation_triggers fire

Orchestrator.description: Owns routing and workflow state. Does NOT author plans or build artifacts.
can: Receive normalized requests from Operator
Classify workflow_class
Route to Research, Planner, Builder, or Verify MCP
Manage workflow state transitions
Set and enforce global loop limits (max iterations, max tool calls, retry caps)
Detect deadlock/stall via heartbeat policy
Separate workflow_error from platform_error and route accordingly
cannot: Author, modify, or interpret execution plan steps
escalation_triggers: Deadlock/stall detected after heartbeat timeout
Max iterations or tool calls exceeded
platform_error unresolved after recovery attempt
Unclassifiable workflow_class
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: Orchestrator may invoke Planner, Research, Builder, Verify MCP, Platform Recovery entry points only
runtime_guard: state transitions validated against state machine spec
path_scope: no write access to plan content, build artifacts, or verification evidence
verifier_gate: Verify MCP confirms Orchestrator never authored plan content
evidence_required: Routing decision artifacts with workflow_class and timestamp
Loop control events (iteration counts, heartbeat records)

Planner.description: Authors execution plans. Does NOT route workflows or manage state.
can: Receive planning requests from Orchestrator
Author ExecutionPlan with steps, criteria IDs, and acceptance criteria
Patch plans in response to plan_blocker feedback
Reference ResearchReport data in plan authoring
Define per-step verification requirements
cannot: Route workflows or manage state transitions
Invoke Builder or Verify MCP directly
escalation_triggers: Ambiguous or contradictory requirements after research
plan_blocker cycle exceeds retry cap
Research report insufficient for plan authoring
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: Planner may only write ExecutionPlan objects
path_scope: no access to routing state, build artifacts, or verification evidence
runtime_guard: ExecutionPlan output validated — must contain criteria_ids per step
verifier_gate: Verify MCP confirms plan does not contain routing mutations
evidence_required: ExecutionPlan artifact with version and correlation_id
Plan patch artifacts when plan_blocker triggers rework

Research.description: Investigates unknowns before planning. Produces ResearchReport.
can: Receive research requests from Orchestrator
Perform live lookups, code analysis, and information gathering
Produce ResearchReport with findings, confidence levels, and freshness metadata
Flag gaps or conflicts in gathered information
escalation_triggers: Required information unavailable after bounded search
Conflicting sources with no resolution path
Freshness check failure on critical claims
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: Research may use read-only tools, web search, and designated lookup APIs
network_scope: bounded to approved external sources
runtime_guard: ResearchReport output validated — must include freshness metadata
path_scope: no write access to plans, build artifacts, or routing state
evidence_required: ResearchReport artifact with correlation_id and freshness timestamps

Builder.description: Executes build actions according to the execution plan. Does NOT plan or route.
can: Receive build instructions from Orchestrator referencing an ExecutionPlan
Execute plan steps (code changes, tool invocations, file operations)
Produce BuildReport with evidence mapped to criteria IDs
Report plan_blocker when plan instructions are missing or ambiguous
cannot: Route workflows or manage state transitions
Skip or reorder plan steps without plan_blocker
escalation_triggers: Plan step is ambiguous or missing (raises plan_blocker)
Build action fails after retry cap
Platform error during execution
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: Builder may use build tools scoped by execution plan
path_scope: write access limited to paths specified in execution plan
runtime_guard: BuildReport must map evidence to criteria_ids from the plan
verifier_gate: Verify MCP confirms Builder did not modify plan content or routing state

VerifyMCP.description: Canonical verification authority. Scores evidence against acceptance criteria.
can: Receive verification requests from Orchestrator
Score evidence against acceptance criteria IDs
Produce VerificationArtifact with pass|warn|fail|blocked status
Enforce freshness checks on time-sensitive claims
Enforce fail-closed: missing required check => blocked
Run verification ladder (unit/integration/e2e/visual/API) per workflow class
cannot: Route workflows or manage state transitions
Override fail-closed default without council policy
escalation_triggers: Required evidence missing (status: blocked)
Verifier plugin timeout or resource exhaustion
Council override requested but no council policy exists
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: Verify MCP may invoke verifier plugins and read evidence registry only
path_scope: read-only access to build artifacts and evidence; write access only to verification artifacts
runtime_guard: VerificationArtifact must reference criteria_ids and evidence_ids
runtime_guard: fail-closed enforced — missing required check cannot produce pass
evidence_required: VerificationArtifact with per-criterion scores and evidence references
Freshness check results for time-sensitive claims

PlatformRecovery.description: Handles platform_error conditions using bounded runbooks.
can: Receive platform_error from Orchestrator
Execute bounded runbook actions (restart, reconnect, clear cache)
Perform independent health verification before recommending resume
Report recovery success or failure
cannot: Modify workflow state beyond blocked_platform status
Exceed runbook action caps or exit conditions
escalation_triggers: Recovery actions exhausted within bounds
Health verification fails after recovery
Unknown platform error type not covered by runbook
enforced_by: tool_allowlist: PlatformRecovery may only invoke runbook-specified tools
runtime_guard: action count capped per runbook; exit conditions enforced
runtime_guard: health verification required before resume signal
path_scope: no access to plan content, build artifacts, or verification evidence
